name: Fazier
description: Product launch platform with a launch leaderboard that is especially strong for AI-first and SaaS products, surfacing new tools to founders, makers and early adopters.

auth.notes: Email/password account (social sign-in also available) to submit and schedule a launch. Free launches join the public leaderboard; paid tiers add featured placement and badges.

best_practices: Fazier skews AI-first and SaaS — lead with the AI capability or the SaaS outcome and the specific use case it nails.
Make the tagline concrete about the value (what it automates or accelerates) rather than generic 'AI-powered' phrasing.
Name the ideal customer and the workflow you improve; this leaderboard audience scans for fit fast.
Highlight integrations, models or your tech edge — AI/SaaS buyers here look for substance and differentiation.
Schedule your launch date deliberately and rally your network early in the day to climb the launch leaderboard.
Add a short demo video or product GIF; seeing the AI/SaaS flow in action converts far better than static shots.
Use a crisp square logo and clear screenshots so the listing looks credible at a glance.

questions.label: Tagline
questions.help: Concrete value line; what it automates or accelerates for whom.

questions.label: Description
questions.help: What it does, the AI/SaaS use case, integrations and who it's for.

questions.label: Launch date
questions.help: Schedule the day your product appears on the launch leaderboard.

questions.label: Demo video URL
questions.help: Short video or GIF showing the product in action.
